text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what's on board! 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了TOUSKA号，并向其发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。TOUSKA号因其过往的非法活动记录而受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在查看船上装载了什么！ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar: The IDF has withdrew from the outskirts of Rshaf and Wadi Al-Ayoun towards the town of Dibl, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《消息报》（Al-Akhbar）：以色列国防军已从黎巴嫩南部拉沙夫（Rshaf）和瓦迪阿永（Wadi Al-Ayoun）郊区撤退至迪布尔（Dibl）镇。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says a U.S. Navy destroyer intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo ship: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Maritime tracking data shows the last recorded location of the Iranian flagged cargo ship Touska after it was boarded by U.S. Marines. The container carrier seems to have attempted to reach the Iranian waters, it then changed course, reduced speed and was declared "not under control" around here: 24° 41N 61° 9E @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普称一艘美国海军驱逐舰拦截了一艘伊朗籍货船：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 海事追踪数据显示了伊朗籍货船Touska在被美国海军陆战队登船后的最后记录位置。这艘集装箱货轮似乎曾试图驶向伊朗水域，随后改变航向、减速，并在该位置被宣布为“失控”：北纬24°41'，东经61°9' @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING! Trump took to social media to personally announce that the USS Spruance fired on and disabled the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska in the Gulf of Oman after it allegedly attempted to pass through Washington's naval blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 突发！特朗普在社交媒体上亲自宣布，美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS Spruance）驱逐舰在阿曼湾向一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船“图斯卡”号（Touska）开火并使其瘫痪，此前该船涉嫌试图强行通过华盛顿的海上封锁线。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡ 🇮🇷 US forces opened fire on Iranian commercial vessel and forced it to return towards Iranian territorial waters. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡ 🇮🇷 美国军队向一艘伊朗商船开火，并迫使其返回伊朗领海。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: BREAKING: Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：今天，一艘名为“图斯卡”号（TOUSKA）的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海上封锁，但他们的下场并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了“图斯卡”号，并向其发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。“图斯卡”号因其过往的非法活动记录而受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在检查船上装载的物品！

text: WarMonitor Kash Patel is trying to keep his job by telling Trump what he wants to hear. Q: Do you have anything to tell us about the 2020 election being rigged against President Trump? Kash Patel: Absolutely. I am never going to let this go. They tried to rig the entire system. We are going to be making arrests https://x.com/atrupar/status/2045874479994171673/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet

text: Open Source Intel Senator Graham: Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards. Lindsey Graham: The brilliant blockade is crushing the Iranian economy. The IRGC attack on international shipping is a sign of desperation. Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards. As to enrichment, if you thought it would be a bad idea to recognize that al Qaeda has a right to enrich even with a moratorium, you’d be right. The Iranian regime and al Qaeda are no different. They have the same goals. This terrorist regime with American blood on its hands has no right to enrich, period. They cheat and lie. No JCPOA-like deal on President Trump’s watch. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 格雷厄姆参议员：总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你就真正掌握了所有筹码。林赛·格雷厄姆：这一出色的封锁正在摧毁伊朗经济。伊斯兰革命卫队对国际航运的攻击是绝望的迹象。总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你就真正掌握了所有筹码。关于浓缩铀，如果你认为承认基地组织即使在暂停期也有权进行浓缩是一个坏主意，那你是对的。伊朗政权和基地组织没有什么不同。他们有相同的目标。这个手上沾满美国人鲜血的恐怖政权没有权利进行浓缩，一点也没有。他们欺骗和撒谎。在特朗普总统任内，绝不会有类似伊核协议（JCPOA）的交易。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Semi-official Iranian media Mehr claims that the U.S. Navy fired upon a commercial Iranian ship in the area of the Oman Sea, forcing it to retreat to Iranian waters. U.S. Navy vessels were forced to retreat from the area after IRGC vessels were mobilized to the area following the incident. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗半官方媒体迈赫尔通讯社（Mehr）声称，美国海军在阿曼海地区向一艘伊朗商船开火，迫使其撤回伊朗水域。在事件发生后，随着伊斯兰革命卫队舰艇被调动到该地区，美国海军舰艇被迫撤离。推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Department of the Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has issued a general license for Russian crude oil until May 16th, 2026 effectively pausing all sanctions on Russian related crude oil sales. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045944056484601908/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Iranian state news agency Tasnim has posted a lengthy statement to X describing what Iran sees as continued U.S. preparations to continue the war while publicly stating they are willing to negotiate. The statement goes on to say that Iran is prepared to "abandon restraints" shown in the first phase of the war to unleash "unforgettable hellish hours right from the outset of renewed conflict with America and Israel" while explicitly stating that the Bab al Mandeb Strait, Saudi Aramco facilities, the port of Yanbu in Saudi Arabia, and the city of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates will all enter the conflict. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗国家通讯社塔斯尼姆（Tasnim）在X上发布了一份长篇声明，描述了伊朗所认为的美国在公开声称愿意谈判的同时，继续为战争做准备的行为。声明接着说，伊朗准备“放弃”在战争第一阶段表现出的“克制”，以释放“从与美国和以色列重新冲突开始时就令人难忘的地狱时刻”，同时明确指出曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施、沙特阿拉伯延布港和阿拉伯联合酋长国富查伊拉市都将卷入冲突。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian state media: Iran "considers the scenario of war more likely than the continuation of negotiations" and claims full preparedness. Tasnim. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗国家媒体：伊朗“认为战争的可能性比继续谈判更大”，并声称已做好充分准备。塔斯尼姆通讯社。推文

text: Open Source Intel The British military has raised its top alert level for the Strait of Hormuz and the Persian Gulf, calling conditions “critical.” UKMTO reported heavy naval activity and warned of a high risk of attack or miscalculation as Iran tightens transit rules and U.S. forces enforce a blockade. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国军方已将霍尔木兹海峡和波斯湾的警戒级别提高到最高，称局势“危急”。英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称海军活动频繁，并警告称，随着伊朗收紧过境规则和美军加强封锁，发生攻击或误判的风险很高。推文

text: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 L’Orient-Le Jour: The French financial prosecutor has opened an investigation into Bank Audi France and Antoun Sehnaoui’s Richelieu Group over suspected financial crimes. The probe reportedly includes allegations of money laundering, aggravated breach of trust, and potential tax fraud, following complaints filed by anti-corruption groups related to billions of financial transfers from Lebanon during the economic crisis which resulted to millions of Lebanese losing their money overnight. The investigation was launched by the Paris prosecutor after complaints by NGOs and victims’ groups, with authorities deeming the evidence sufficiently serious to proceed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 《东方日报》（L’Orient-Le Jour）：法国金融检察官已对奥迪银行法国分行（Bank Audi France）和安通·塞纳维（Antoun Sehnaoui）的黎塞留集团（Richelieu Group）涉嫌金融犯罪展开调查。据报道，调查内容包括洗钱、严重背信和潜在税务欺诈的指控，此前反腐败组织就经济危机期间从黎巴嫩转移的数十亿资金提出了投诉，导致数百万黎巴嫩人一夜之间血本无归。调查由巴黎检察官在非政府组织和受害者团体投诉后发起，当局认为证据足以严重到可以进行调查。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇧🇬🇪🇺BULGARIAN ELECTIONS – THE FINAL SHOWDOWN? MOST LIKELY NOT Bulgarians are at the polls today for the 8th parliamentary election since the mass anti-corruption protests of 2020 toppled Boyko Borissov's decade-long pro EU installed government. Borissov…" RADEV'S PROGRESSIVE BULGARIA WON - BRUSSELS CLEPTOCRATS ARE ALREADY Exit polls in Bulgaria show a resounding victory (37.5–39.2%) for the Brussels-skeptic coalition "Progressive Bulgaria," led by former president Rumen Radev — whom Western media and the Brussels kleptocracy are already branding " Orbán 2.0 " for his years of blocking sanctions on Russia in the interest of Bulgarian economy, and opposing military aid to Ukraine . 🇪🇺 💀 THE "ORBÁN 2.0" LABEL The "Orbán 2.0" label is telling — not because it's accurate, but because of how automatically and desperately it gets deployed the moment any European leader refuses to lick the boots of Brussels and Washington. Radev's actual platform was built on anti-corruption and dismantling the old EU/USAID imposed&built elites. But when you also happen to believe that provoking a nuclear-armed Russia isn't smart foreign policy, the Brussels narrative machine has only one setting: "Putin's puppet." 📊 THE FULL RANKINGS - EU'S BLACK FRIDAY SUNDAY Second place went to GERB-SDS (~15–16%) — Brussels/EPP/von der Leyen's loyalists. Third place went to the (shit)liberal PP-DB (~13–14%) — the "crypto/NGO" Brussels puppets. 🧮 THE ARITHMETIC PROBLEM With ~110–111 seats out of 240 (121 needed for a majority), Progressive Bulgaria falls short of governing alone. They've ruled out coalitions with GERB-SDS and Washington-sanctioned DPS . That leaves only one arithmetic option: PP-DB , the We Continue the Change bloc — if their Atlanticist masters approve it. 🐻 BOTTOM LINE Even if PB manages to form a coalition, a 9th round of snap elections remains the most probable outcome — one where Progressive Bulgaria will likely improve further at the expense of the pro-Brussels satellites. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇧🇬🇪🇺保加利亚大选——最终对决？很可能不是。保加利亚人今天参加了自2020年大规模反腐败抗议活动推翻博伊科·鲍里索夫（Boyko Borissov）长达十年的亲欧盟政府以来的第八次议会选举。鲍里索夫……” 拉德夫的进步保加利亚党获胜——布鲁塞尔的窃国大盗们已经…… 保加利亚的出口民调显示，由前总统鲁门·拉德夫（Rumen Radev）领导的“怀疑布鲁塞尔”联盟“进步保加利亚”取得了压倒性胜利（37.5–39.2%）。西方媒体和布鲁塞尔的窃国大盗们已经给他贴上了“欧尔班2.0”的标签，因为他多年来为了保加利亚的经济利益而阻止对俄制裁，并反对向乌克兰提供军事援助。 🇪🇺 💀 “欧尔班2.0”标签 “欧尔班2.0”这个标签很有说明意义——不是因为它准确，而是因为一旦有欧洲领导人拒绝向布鲁塞尔和华盛顿卑躬屈膝，这个标签就会被自动且绝望地贴上。拉德夫的实际纲领建立在反腐败和拆除旧的欧盟/美国国际开发署（USAID）强加和建立的精英阶层之上。但当你恰好认为挑衅一个拥有核武器的俄罗斯不是明智的外交政策时，布鲁塞尔的叙事机器就只有一种设定：“普京的傀儡”。 📊 完整排名——欧盟的黑色星期五周日 第二名是GERB-SDS（约15–16%）——布鲁塞尔/欧洲人民党/冯德莱恩的忠实拥护者。第三名是（垃圾）自由派PP-DB（约13–14%）——“加密货币/非政府组织”布鲁塞尔傀儡。 🧮 算术难题 在240个席位中仅获得约110–111个席位（多数席位需要121个），“进步保加利亚”无法单独执政。他们排除了与GERB-SDS和受华盛顿制裁的DPS结盟的可能性。这只剩下一个算术选择：PP-DB，“我们继续变革”集团——如果他们的大西洋主义主子批准的话。 🐻 结论 即使“进步保加利亚”设法组建了联盟，第九轮提前选举仍然是最可能的结果——届时“进步保加利亚”可能会以牺牲亲布鲁塞尔的卫星党为代价进一步提升实力。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Not my fault Europe imported the most tribalistic uneducated individuals from war zones here You reap what you sow. You failed to vet and that's on you. /60103?comment=237867" I agree with you admin, however the hate for Islam has little to do with immigration lol, they hate Muslims and Islam either way. Concepts like wars, mass raping, collapsing of society, degeneracy, animalistic behavior are Western specialities.The initial argument is retarded. Most rape cases in Europe go unreported, and in the cases where they do get reported, most get dismissed. This reflects the huge issue in Europe of hidden figures within crime statistics – the rapists are not dark skinned immigrant men wearing hoodies on the street. The rapist is the friend of the girl, the brother of the girl, the uncle of the girl, the boyfriend of the girl – in the hidden figures he is in a close relation to the girl. Rapes happen during parties in a drunk state, during family functions, or between "friends". The alcohol and the blurred boundaries is an European, degenerate, cultural issue. Rape is native to European countries and their history, and to this day, women are scared of coming forward because of the close relation. Overreprepresentation of immigrants in rape arguments is retarded. No need to discuss the argument of wars, we all know they start the wars 🤷‍♂️
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“这不是我的错，欧洲从战区引进了最部落化、最没受过教育的人。种瓜得瓜，种豆得豆。你们没能进行背景调查，那是你们自己的责任。/60103?comment=237867” 我同意你的观点，管理员，但对伊斯兰教的仇恨与移民关系不大，哈哈，他们无论如何都仇恨穆斯林和伊斯兰教。战争、大规模强奸、社会崩溃、堕落、兽性等概念是西方的特产。最初的论点是愚蠢的。欧洲大多数强奸案都没有被报道，而在被报道的案件中，大多数都被驳回了。这反映了欧洲犯罪统计数据中隐藏数字的巨大问题——强奸犯不是街上戴着连帽衫的深色皮肤移民男子。强奸犯是女孩的朋友、女孩的兄弟、女孩的叔叔、女孩的男朋友——在隐藏的数字中，他与女孩有着密切的关系。强奸发生在醉酒状态下的聚会、家庭聚会或“朋友”之间。酒精和模糊的界限是一个欧洲的、堕落的文化问题。强奸在欧洲国家及其历史上是本土存在的，直到今天，女性因为这种密切关系而害怕站出来。在强奸论点中过度强调移民是愚蠢的。没必要讨论战争的论点，我们都知道是他们发起的战争 🤷‍♂️

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Semi-official Iranian media Mehr claims that the U.S. Navy fired upon a commercial Iranian ship in the area of the Oman Sea, forcing it to retreat to Iranian waters. U.S. Navy vessels were forced to retreat from the area after IRGC vessels were mobilized to the area following the incident. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗半官方媒体梅尔通讯社声称，美国海军在阿曼海地区向一艘伊朗商船开火，迫使其撤回伊朗水域。在事件发生后，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）船只被动员到该地区，美国海军舰艇被迫撤离。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Tasnim News: Iran prepared for possible resumption of war Monitoring of US movements in recent days points to several notable shifts: 1. Repositioning of certain US warships 2. An unprecedented airlift for equipment transfers 3. Multiple heavy C-5 and C-17 aircraft involved in weapons transport 4. Amphibious island-seizure drills in Bahrain and rapid coastal assault exercises 5. Extensive US reconnaissance drone flights over Iranian islands 6. Repositioning of certain US air defense systems in the region Iran is simultaneously considering two scenarios and has prepared for both. ➡️ Scenario 1: The US buildup is psychological pressure aimed at extracting concessions at the negotiating table. Washington threatens on one hand while constantly amplifying talk of negotiations in the media on the other. Iran has put forward its proposals based on realism and the fundamental rights of the Iranian nation — it is the US that must abandon its excessive demands. As past pressure and threats have had no effect on Iran's negotiating position, this time will be no different. ➡️ Scenario 2: The talk of negotiations is cover for a surprise military strike targeting Iranian islands. The US has extensive experience using negotiations as a deception tool — twice in the past year it attacked Iran while publicly claiming talks were progressing. Iran is fully prepared this time and considers the war scenario more likely than continued negotiations. Based on preparations carried out over the past two weeks, Iran is ready to deliver a memorable hellish opening to any renewed conflict with the US and Israel. Analysis of Iran's positioning also indicates that if war resumes and infrastructure is again targeted, Iran will fully abandon the restraints it observed in the first round regarding Bab al-Mandab, Aramco, Yanbu, and Fujairah. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗为可能重启的战争做好准备。最近几天对美国动向的监测显示出几个值得注意的变化：1. 某些美国军舰的重新部署 2. 前所未有的装备转移空运 3. 多架重型C-5和C-17飞机参与武器运输 4. 在巴林进行两栖夺岛演习和快速海岸突击演习 5. 美国在伊朗岛屿上空进行广泛的侦察无人机飞行 6. 某些美国防空系统在该地区的重新部署。伊朗正在同时考虑两种方案，并已为两者做好准备。 ➡️ 方案1：美国的集结是旨在在谈判桌上获取让步的心理压力。华盛顿一方面进行威胁，另一方面在媒体上不断放大谈判的言论。伊朗基于现实主义和伊朗民族的基本权利提出了自己的建议——必须放弃过分要求的是美国。由于过去的压力和威胁对伊朗的谈判立场没有任何影响，这次也不会有任何不同。 ➡️ 方案2：关于谈判的言论是针对伊朗岛屿进行突然军事打击的掩护。美国在利用谈判作为欺骗工具方面拥有丰富的经验——过去一年中，它曾两次在公开声称谈判取得进展的同时攻击伊朗。伊朗这次已做好充分准备，并认为战争方案比继续谈判更有可能。基于过去两周进行的准备工作，伊朗已准备好为与美国和以色列的任何新冲突提供一个令人难忘的地狱般的开端。对伊朗部署的分析还表明，如果战争重启且基础设施再次成为目标，伊朗将完全放弃其在第一轮中对曼德海峡、沙特阿美、延布和富查伊拉所遵守的克制。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Lindsey Graham: The brilliant blockade is crushing the Iranian economy. The IRGC attack on international shipping is a sign of desperation. Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards. As to enrichment, if you thought it would be a bad idea to recognize that al Qaeda has a right to enrich even with a moratorium, you’d be right. The Iranian regime and al Qaeda are no different. They have the same goals. This terrorist regime with American blood on its hands has no right to enrich, period. They cheat and lie. No JCPOA-like deal on President Trump’s watch. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Lindsey Graham：辉煌的封锁正在摧毁伊朗经济。伊斯兰革命卫队对国际航运的袭击是绝望的迹象。总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你就真正掌握了所有筹码。关于浓缩铀，如果你认为承认基地组织即使在暂停期内也有权进行浓缩是一个坏主意，那你是对的。伊朗政权和基地组织没有什么不同。他们有相同的目标。这个手上沾满美国人鲜血的恐怖政权没有权利进行浓缩，句号。他们欺骗和撒谎。在特朗普总统任内，绝不会有类似伊核协议（JCPOA）的交易。推文

text: Faytuks News Iranian state news agency Tasnim: "Iran considers the scenario of war more likely than the continuation of negotiations" تروریست‌های آمریکایی در موضوع فریب با مذاکره تجربه بالایی دارند و در طول یکسال، دوبار در حین مذاکره و در حالی که مدام از رو به پیشرفت بودن مذاکرات سخن می‌گفتند به ایران حمله کردند ایران این بار نیز آمادگی کامل دارد و سناریوی جنگ را محتمل‌تر از ادامه مذاکرات در نظر گرفته است - خبرگزاری تسنیم tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 伊朗国家通讯社塔斯尼姆通讯社：“伊朗认为战争的可能性大于继续谈判”。美国恐怖分子在通过谈判进行欺骗方面经验丰富，在一年内，他们曾两次在谈判期间，一边不断声称谈判正在取得进展，一边袭击伊朗。伊朗这次也做好了充分准备，认为战争的可能性大于继续谈判——塔斯尼姆通讯社 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | According Reuters, Iran rejected new peace talks with the United States, its state news agency reported on Sunday, hours after U.S. President Donald Trump had said he was sending envoys to Pakistan for talks and would strike Iran unless it accepted his terms. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 快讯 | 据路透社报道，伊朗国家通讯社周日报道称，伊朗拒绝了与美国进行新的和平谈判。此前数小时，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普曾表示，他将派遣特使前往巴基斯坦进行谈判，并威胁称如果伊朗不接受他的条件，将对伊朗进行打击。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Israel’s Channel 12, the Israeli security cabinet is convening this evening as tensions between Iran and the United States escalate. 🟥 A full cabinet meeting is scheduled for tomorrow afternoon. Israel assesses that President Trump is still seeking a deal; if talks in Pakistan fail, the ceasefire will likely be extended to allow further negotiations. At the same time, preparations are underway for a possible resumption of hostilities. 🗣️ A senior Israeli official said: “We cannot say with certainty where things are heading. If you put the president’s statements into ChatGPT, it would probably freeze. As before, Trump wants negotiations, but Iran’s hardline stance could lead to renewed fighting.” 🔹 Trump warned today that if Iran does not agree to a deal, the U.S. would strike Iran’s power plants and bridges. Israel is preparing target lists in case fighting resumes, though officials stress these would not necessarily be limited to infrastructure. 🔹 “The transition from ceasefire to renewed combat could happen very quickly, and all relevant systems are on standby,” the official added. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据以色列第12频道报道，随着伊朗和美国之间紧张局势升级，以色列安全内阁将于今晚召开会议。🟥 全体内阁会议定于明天下午举行。以色列评估认为，特朗普总统仍在寻求达成协议；如果巴基斯坦的谈判失败，停火协议可能会延长以允许进一步谈判。与此同时，正在为可能恢复敌对行动做准备。🗣️ 一位以色列高级官员表示：“我们无法确定事态将走向何方。如果你把总统的言论输入ChatGPT，它可能会死机。和以前一样，特朗普想要谈判，但伊朗的强硬立场可能导致战斗重燃。” 🔹 特朗普今天警告说，如果伊朗不同意达成协议，美国将打击伊朗的发电厂和桥梁。以色列正在准备目标清单以防战斗恢复，尽管官员们强调这些目标不一定仅限于基础设施。🔹 “从停火到恢复战斗的转变可能发生得非常快，所有相关系统都处于待命状态，”该官员补充道。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 The Chinese corporation "Norinco" has ramped up production of new Type 19 infantry fighting vehicles for the needs of the People's Liberation Army of China. In February alone, about 100 vehicles were produced. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045935602885939243/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 中国北方工业公司（Norinco）已加大新型19式步兵战车的生产力度，以满足中国人民解放军的需求。仅在二月份，就生产了约100辆。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045935602885939243/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif: "I had a warm and constructive conversation with President Masoud Pezeshkian this evening on the evolving regional situation. I appreciated Iran's engagement, including its high-level delegation to Islamabad for the historic talks, and recent discussions with Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir in Tehran. I also shared insights from my recent engagements with leaders of Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Turkey. I assured him that, with the support of friends and partners, Pakistan remains fully committed to its role as an honest and sincere facilitator of lasting peace and regional stability." Pakistan PM Shahbaz Sharif spoke with Iranian President Pezeshkian for 45 minutes this evening. The two "had a detailed exchange about the current situation in the region," per the Pakistani PM's office. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045928950673588447/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫：“今晚我与马苏德·佩泽希齐扬总统就不断演变的地区局势进行了亲切且富有建设性的交谈。我赞赏伊朗的参与，包括其派往伊斯兰堡进行历史性会谈的高级代表团，以及最近在德黑兰与赛义德·阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅的讨论。我还分享了我最近与沙特阿拉伯、卡塔尔和土耳其领导人接触的见解。我向他保证，在朋友和伙伴的支持下，巴基斯坦仍然完全致力于发挥其作为持久和平与地区稳定诚实、真诚促进者的作用。” 巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫今晚与伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬进行了45分钟的通话。据巴基斯坦总理办公室称，两人“就该地区当前局势进行了详细交流”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045928950673588447/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: 🎥 ON TODAY'S SHOW! Trump Threatens to Destroy Iran's Civilian Infrastructure — Again On today's show, we look at the developments that took place over the weekend — the confusing situation regarding the opening of the Strait of Hormuz that unfolded on Friday, through to today's repeated threats made by Trump as he announced another round of talks in Islamabad. We will be joined later in the show by Lugansk-born former US Army officer and military-political analyst Stanislav Krapivnik. ➡️ 10PM CET - 11PM MSK - 4PM ET - 1PM PT ➡️ Watch LIVE on: YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🎥 今日节目！特朗普再次威胁要摧毁伊朗的民用基础设施。在今天的节目中，我们回顾了周末发生的事态发展——从周五展开的关于开放霍尔木兹海峡的混乱局势，到今天特朗普在宣布在伊斯兰堡进行新一轮谈判时发出的反复威胁。节目稍后将有出生于卢甘斯克的美国陆军前军官、军事政治分析师斯坦尼斯拉夫·克拉皮夫尼克加入。➡️ 欧洲中部时间晚上10点 - 莫斯科时间晚上11点 - 美国东部时间下午4点 - 太平洋时间下午1点 ➡️ 观看直播：YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senator Graham: Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你才能真正掌握所有筹码。
